parameters.content:
## [Admin] List Clients v1.0.0

**Trigger:** GET /caiac/admin/clients (no query params)
**Auth:** HMAC (x-caiac-timestamp + x-caiac-signature) + Authorization: Bearer token
**Access:** role IN (staff/admin/owner) OR is_caiac_staff=true — no client_id restriction

Returns all active clients as { clients: [{slug, name}, ...], count: N }.
Used to populate the client selector dropdown in the Ops Dashboard.

**Notes:**
- No client_id param — HMAC envelope secret is fixed to Henderson's webhook_secret (slug='henderson'), same as dashboard CLIENT_WEBHOOK_SECRET
- Role check has no slug comparison; any staff/admin/owner or CAIAC staff can call this
- Empty result returns { clients: [], count: 0 }

parameters.query:
SELECT id, webhook_secret
FROM caiac.clients
WHERE slug = 'henderson'
LIMIT 1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ timestamp: $('Receive Clients Request').item.json.headers['x-caiac-timestamp'], signature: $('Receive Clients Request').item.json.headers['x-caiac-signature'], signing_key: $('Receive Clients Request').item.json.headers.authorization.replace('Bearer ', '').trim(), secret: $input.first().json.webhook_secret }) }}

parameters.query:
SELECT s.user_id, s.role, s.client_id, s.expires_at,
       u.name, u.email, u.active as user_active, u.is_caiac_staff,
       c.slug, c.active as client_active
FROM caiac.sessions s
JOIN caiac.users u ON s.user_id = u.id
JOIN caiac.clients c ON s.client_id = c.id
WHERE s.token = '{{ $('Check HMAC Valid').item.json.token }}'
AND s.expires_at > NOW()
AND u.active = true
AND c.active = true
LIMIT 1

SELECT slug, name
FROM caiac.clients
WHERE active = true
ORDER BY name

parameters.jsCode:
const clients = $input.all().map(item => ({ slug: item.json.slug, name: item.json.name }));
return [{ json: { clients, count: clients.length } }];
